case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MATSON ROBERT M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,078.89 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MATSON ROBERT M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATSON ROBERT M. $1,078.89 PRINCIPAL, $18.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,097.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATSON ROBERT M.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $965.06 AS TO DEFENDANT MATSON ROBERT M.
